text: Well done to everyone at @NASA on a successful launch today! Excited to commemorate this historic mission with today’s Doodle on our homepage. Incredible to think about all of the exciting things the Artemis II mission will unlock for future space travel. Godspeed to the crew!

A celebration of color, community, and new beginnings. Happy Holi to all!

Incredible shot by @prajai_k taken on Pixel 8 Pro.

My favorite part of traveling anywhere is spending time with Googlers around the world.

Even more true when @shubmangill is there too!

Google India thank you for having me!

Packed first day at the AI Impact Summit in India. Enjoyed meeting with the Honorable PM @narendramodi and spending time with so many partners, students, and Googlers. Plus we made some big announcements on new subsea cables, science and skilling.

Even managed to get a bit of cricket in too :)  🇺🇸 🇮🇳
Nice to be back in India for the AI Impact Summit - a very warm welcome as always and the papers looked great too:)

Last time I visited Taipei 101, I just took the elevator up, apparently theres a different route. 

A few photos from Googlers with the ultimate view of @alexhonnold ’s free-solo of Taipei 101 from our office on the 75th floor!

 Congrats Alex on an amazing achievement.

In honor of Veterans Day, today’s #GoogleDoodle pays respect and gratitude to the generational legacies of military families.

Hand-painted by U.S. Navy veteran Kristin Cronic, this artwork honors their heroic service around the world and here at home. Swipe through to read letters of deep gratitude from around the country.
Obviously this is the only way we serve the barfi in my house:). Wishing everyone a Happy Diwali filled with light, joy, and your favorite festive treats (Google themed or otherwise!).

Today we rolled out a new image editing model in @googlegemini that’s really good at maintaining likeness across contexts. Tried it out with my dog Jeffree in honor of National Dog Day - though I think he looks most at home on the couch:) You can edit your own photos in the @googlegemini in iOS or Android.
Meet Pixel 10 and our latest lineup of helpful devices — all Made by Google and powered by our cutting-edge AI.

I love seeing all of the beautiful photos shot on Pixel from all over the 🌍 every #WorldPhotographyDay. Thank you to Googlers Parth, Azar, Seth, Gautam, Oanh, Becky and Kama for sharing your photos!

More photography features to come at Made by Google tomorrow!
Happy 4th 🇺🇸! Creating some fractal fireworks with Gemini 2.5 Pro:)
